title: AI CEO: THIS is How I'd Make My First Million With AI in 2026
description:
AI is creating a new class of millionaires, and it's not just coders or Silicon Valley insiders. In this video, I break down how regular people who think like startup founders are using AI to win in the 2020s.

Drawing from my experience as a CEO, board member, and tech investor, I'll show you the real advantage in an AI-driven world: building feedback loops that compound faster than talent or capital. You'll learn the four loops that matter most and how the best builders of 2026 use them to outlearn and outpace everyone else.

00:00 AI Millionaires: The New Frontier
00:36 Understanding the Financial Shift
01:57 The Balance Loop: Asymmetric Advantage and Acute Pain
05:20 Speed to Revenue Loop: The Cursor Case Study
07:33 Signal to Innovation Loop: Learning from YouTube and Quibi
11:31 Sweat Equity Loop: The Founder's Journey
13:30 Conclusion: Wisdom and Wealth
